creator: ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
text:
I would like to become the maintainer of net/gq, if possible.

Fix: 

-MAINTAINER=    ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=    ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
 COMMENT=       GTK-based LDAP client

 LIB_DEPENDS=   gnome-keyring:${PORTSDIR}/security/gnome-keyring--n8WxwUMAZ2CnERljGVTV5AvNiIQVSjFniLWDrDQvUhlMJ3qF
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.orig       2008-03-22 13:01:04.032674055 +0100
+++ Makefile    2008-03-22 13:01:18.395636666 +0100
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@
 CATEGORIES=    net
 MASTER_SITES=  SF/gqclient
